# AVION Academy

## Overview
AVION Academy is a training and placement institute in Dewas, Madhya Pradesh, offering practical education in programming, web development, Python, MERN Stack, AI/ML, and digital marketing. And it provides online and offline courses with hands-on projects, career guidance, and placement support to help students secure jobs in the tech industry.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://avionacademy.co.in/
- About: https://avionacademy.co.in/about
- Courses: https://avionacademy.co.in/courses
- Placements: https://avionacademy.co.in/placements
- Contact: https://avionacademy.co.in/contact

## Services
- Python training
- MERN Stack development training
- Full stack web development
- AI/ML training
- Digital marketing training
- Placement support and career guidance

## Contact
- Email: avionacademyplacement@gmail.com

- Location: Dewas, Madhya Pradesh, India
